summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: BLUE inner circle + YELLOW always_redraw annular shell (Difference of outer and inner Circle) around it, driven by ValueTracker r_tr sweeping 1→1.4→1.7→2.1→1.3→1.9. Right panel: circle math (A=πR², A'=2πR = circumference, (2πR)dR ≈ ΔA) in sequential FadeIn, then sphere math (V=4πR³/3, V'=4πR² = surface area). YELLOW bottom caption reveals the principle: new-volume shell = (surface area) · dR.
